title: ‘They’re Here!’ Jesse Waters Drops UFO Bombshell & Trump In Unsafe Pentagon Battle!
description: By Lisa Haven Recent reports and social media posts have fueled renewed discussion around UFO/UAP disclosures tied to President Donald Trump, Pentagon document releases, and commentary from Jesse Watters. Major outlets reported that the [...]

title: ‘Age of Disclosure’ director claims Apollo 17 moon photo shows mysterious triangular craft: ‘Most significant’ UAP image yet?
description: A newly released moon mission image has reignited fierce debate over what governments may already know.

title: Reptilians and Insectoids: Ex-CIA Scientist Reveals Specific Alien Species Recovered from UFO Crashes
description: Former CIA-funded researcher Hal Puthoff says trusted insiders told him four alien species are linked to recovered UFO craft, including 'Reptilians and Insectoids,' but offers no direct evidence.

title: Do Aliens Rule Earth’s Oceans? Retired US Navy Admiral Makes Explosive UFO Claim
description: Former US Navy Rear Admiral Tim Gallaudet claims unidentified craft seen by military pilots may be controlled by non-human intelligence, citing mysterious “Go Fast” and “Tic Tac” UFO encounters as evidence of technology which he called beyond human capabilities. The post Do Aliens Rule Earth’s Oceans? Retired US Navy Admiral Makes Explosive UFO Claim appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

title: The UFO files: What did we learn from the Pentagon's 1st big release?
description: On May 8, the Pentagon released its first tranche of "UFO files." Space.com reached out to experts to make sense of this highly anticipated data drop.
